buildCommand: curl -fsSL -o flutter.tar.xz https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.24.5-stable.tar.xz && tar xf flutter.tar.xz && export PATH="$PATH:$(pwd)/flutter/bin" && git config --global --add safe.directory $(pwd)/flutter && flutter config --enable-web --no-analytics && flutter create . --platforms=web --project-name nuzl_app && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=/api
